scripts.version:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run version:sync
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run version:sync
scripts.version:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && npm run version:sync
scripts.prebuild:android: npm run version:sync && expo prebuild --platform android
scripts.build:apk: npm run version:sync && expo prebuild --platform android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.update:preview: npm run version:sync && npx eas-cli update --channel preview
scripts.update:production: npm run version:sync && npx eas-cli update --channel production
